name: Portfolio Analytics Suite
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install fastapi uvicorn pydantic && cd frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: cd backend && nohup uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0 > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & cd /workspaces/portfolio-analytics-suite/frontend && npm run dev
